recommendations.title: Enhance BRSR Disclosure Quality
recommendations.description: Improve the quality and completeness of BRSR disclosures to avoid SEBI scrutiny and trading restrictions, ensuring filing compliance by the 2026-05-30 deadline.
recommendations.profitability_link: Avoiding a 20-40 bps increase in cost of capital on ₹50,000 Cr market cap saves ₹100-200 Cr annually.
recommendations.peer_benchmark: Tata Power's timely and comprehensive BRSR filings maintaining investor confidence.

recommendations.title: Commit to 80% Renewable Energy by 2030
recommendations.description: Set a clear target to achieve 80% renewable energy portfolio by 2030, matching Tata Power's strategy to unlock valuation premium and green financing.
recommendations.profitability_link: Achieving green financing eligibility could reduce cost of capital by 30 bps, saving ₹150 Cr annually and potentially increasing valuation by ₹3000 Cr.
recommendations.peer_benchmark: Tata Power's 80% renewable target and ₹5000 Cr green bond issuance.

recommendations.title: Expand GRI and CDP Disclosures
recommendations.description: Enhance GRI and CDP disclosures to improve ESG ratings, aiming for CDP A-list inclusion to attract ESG-focused funds and improve valuation multiples.
recommendations.profitability_link: Improved ESG ratings can prevent fund outflows and support a 5-10% P/E premium, potentially adding ₹2500 Cr in market cap.
recommendations.peer_benchmark: Competitors increasing ESG disclosures to maintain fund inflows.

recommendations.title: Issue ₹4000 Cr Green Bond by 2027
recommendations.description: Raise ₹4000 Cr via green bonds to finance renewable projects, leveraging green financing benefits and enhancing investor appeal.
recommendations.profitability_link: Lower interest rates by 25 bps on ₹4000 Cr saves ₹10 Cr annually in interest expenses.
recommendations.peer_benchmark: Tata Power's ₹5000 Cr green bond issuance.
